SEARCH
Package com.example.eventmanager.repository

Class FirebaseRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventmanager.repository.FirebaseRepository
public class FirebaseRepository extends Object
Central repository for reading and writing entrant and event data in Firestore.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    getEventById(String eventId, FirebaseRepository.RepoCallback<Event> callback)
    Loads an event document by its identifier.
    void
    getUser(String deviceId, FirebaseRepository.RepoCallback<Entrant> callback)
    Retrieves the entrant profile for a device identifier.
    void

    Saves or overwrites an entrant profile in Firestore.

  • Constructor Details

    • FirebaseRepository

      public FirebaseRepository()

  • Method Details

    • getUser

      public void getUser(String deviceId, FirebaseRepository.RepoCallback<Entrant> callback)
      Retrieves the entrant profile for a device identifier.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier used as the user document id
      callback - callback that receives the entrant or null when no profile exists

    • saveUser

      public void saveUser(Entrant entrant, FirebaseRepository.RepoCallback<Void> callback)
      Saves or overwrites an entrant profile in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      entrant - entrant profile to persist
      callback - callback notified when the write completes or fails

    • getEventById

      public void getEventById(String eventId, FirebaseRepository.RepoCallback<Event> callback)
      Loads an event document by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      eventId - event document id
      callback - callback that receives the event or null when it does not exist

    • signUpForEvent

      public void signUpForEvent(String eventId, Entrant entrant, FirebaseRepository.RepoCallback<Void> callback)
      Adds an entrant to an event waiting list.
      Parameters:
      eventId - event document id
      entrant - entrant being added to the waiting list
      callback - callback notified when the sign-up write completes or fails
